title: Repair Player Animation UI and add per-sound meditation animations with proper fullscreen behavior

requirements.summary: Fix the Player’s “Animation” UI so it opens reliably during playback and closes without interrupting audio.
acceptanceCriteria: When a sound or frequency is playing, the Animation UI can be opened and it renders successfully (no white screen, no ErrorBoundary).
Closing the Animation UI returns the user to the normal player screen and audio continues uninterrupted.

file_operations.description: Repair the Player’s visualization/animation trigger wiring: ensure the Animation UI can be opened only when audio is playing, avoid runtime errors by guarding against null refs/state, and make closing the UI simply toggle visualization state without affecting playback.

Create a dedicated Player Animation overlay component responsible for rendering the active animation while audio plays, handling open/close, and providing a safe fallback rendering path to prevent blank screens. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the Animation overlay into the app shell so it renders above the normal UI when visualization fullscreen state is enabled, and unmounts cleanly on close (without affecting audio state).
Harden visualization state management to reduce runtime errors (defensive initialization, safe toggling) and support distinguishing visualization open/close from actual browser fullscreen behavior.

requirements.summary: Implement a meditation-style animation selection system using a centralized mapping from soundId/frequency to an animation type.
acceptanceCriteria: For any currently playing soundId, an animation is chosen deterministically (never falls back to a broken/blank state).
For any currently playing frequency, a frequency-appropriate animation is chosen deterministically.

file_operations.description: Add a centralized, deterministic mapping utility (soundId → animationType; frequency → animationType) and a selector function that always returns a valid animation type with a safe default for unknown inputs.

Use the centralized mapping utility to select the meditation animation based on currentSoundId/currentFrequency and render the chosen animation type deterministically with a non-blank fallback. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Refactor visualization configuration selection so it can be driven by an explicit animationType (selected from the centralized mapping) rather than ad-hoc branching, while keeping a safe default configuration.

requirements.summary: Make fullscreen meditation animations truly cover the viewport, resize correctly on orientation changes, and remain visually comfortable.
acceptanceCriteria: In fullscreen mode, the animation covers the entire screen (no uncovered edges) and maintains correct aspect on resize/orientation changes.
Animations remain smooth and do not strobe/flicker during playback.

file_operations.description: Ensure the overlay is truly viewport-filling (including safe-area handling where applicable), prevents background scroll, and closes predictably via click/tap/ESC without leaving the app in a broken state. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Upgrade canvas sizing for fullscreen correctness and comfort: use devicePixelRatio-aware canvas sizing, listen for resize + orientation changes, and tune animation parameters to avoid strobing/flicker (slower motion, softer contrast, lower alpha pulsing).
Add minimal global styling support for fullscreen overlays (e.g., body scroll lock helper class and safe-area related utilities if needed) using existing global styling entry points.

requirements.summary: Route all visualization/animation UI text through the existing localization system and ensure it is in English (no hardcoded Turkish strings).
acceptanceCriteria: Fullscreen visualization hints/instructions are displayed in English.
No hardcoded non-English UI strings remain in visualization/animation components.

file_operations.description: Add/extend translation keys needed by the visualization/animation UI (e.g., fullscreen open label, exit hint, accessibility labels) with English values (and provide equivalents for other supported languages where appropriate).
Replace hardcoded visualization UI strings with localized strings from useLanguage(), ensuring the default user-facing text is English and no Turkish strings are embedded in the component.
Replace visualization-related button titles/tooltips that are currently hardcoded with localized strings from the existing localization system, ensuring English output.
Ensure any overlay instructions/labels (e.g., how to exit, fullscreen hints) are pulled from useLanguage() translation keys and never hardcoded.
